---
title: "About"
about:
  template: solana          # jolla / trestles / solana / marquee / broadside
---

Organize research papers, concepts in artificial intelligence.

The main topics I cover include:

* Deep Learning & Machine Learning Fundamentals
* Large Language Models (LLMs)
* Paper Reproductions & Implementation Notes

My goal is to deepen my understanding by explaining each paper in my own words.
